name: Austad's Sim Suites
about: Austad's Sim Suites is a premier golf simulator venue focused on providing year-round golf access through simulation technology. The facility features multiple simulator bays equipped with premium launch monitors like Foresight and Uneekor, catering to a wide range of golfers from beginners to serious players. Membership options are available for flexible, affordable access, with plans ranging from monthly to annual that include unlimited play. The venue emphasizes convenience with extended hours and 24/7 access, allowing users to play and practice on their own schedule.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access allows for practice and play anytime,不受天气或光照限制
Premium launch monitor technology provides accurate data and simulation experiences
Flexible membership options cater to different needs and budgets
Custom club fitting services available for game improvement

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs to use the simulators. Custom fitting services are also available if you need equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No, there is no mention of bringing outside food or drinks to the facility.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing time can vary depending on simulator software and pace of play, but typical rounds take 1-2 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is suitable for juniors and families with junior golf apparel and club options available.
